question: TECHNICIAN SELF-EVALUATION FORM  Bob Rohrman Hyundai | Genesis Service Department  Technician Name   Date   Reviewer   Shawn Laughner, Service Manager Employee ID / Initials   Review Period   Current Position  Instructions: This form is for self-evaluation only.
